description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the scorpil/rust:nightly Docker image. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the exact commands "cargo doc --no-deps" and then "mv target/doc public" to generate Rust documentation and move it to the public folder. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and restrict execution to the master branch only. No additional services, caches, or variables are needed.
